summary: A structured record of the provided cosmic governance, metaphysics, trade, military, ritual, species, and afterlife expansions for the Luchii documentation site.

consistencyReview.overall: The material is internally coherent around a stable core cosmology: Engine ∞ as supreme stabilizer, the Eternal Mesh as connective substrate, and the recurring Pulse/Continuum/Prism/Path/Echo/Eternal taxonomy.
strengths: Shared terminology repeats consistently across legal, economic, ritual, and metaphysical systems.
Most systems align to the same authority stack: Engine ∞, Pentarchy, Mythic Engines, ascendants, and omniversal delegates.
Rights, laws, protocols, and vehicles map cleanly onto the same cosmological layers.
issues: The source ends mid-entry at 'Infinite‑Era Astral Species Evolution Expansion', so that item is omitted from the structured dataset.
Some domains overlap by design, especially parliament, governance, diplomacy, charter, and law codex materials.
Several lists use the same class names across trade, transport, and afterlife systems; this is preserved rather than deduplicated.
normalizationChoices: Repeated numbering and labels were normalized into entry ids, categories, section headings, and item arrays.
All equations were stored as plain text strings.
The truncated final entry was excluded and documented as omitted source material.

omittedEntries.title: Infinite‑Era Astral Species Evolution Expansion

entries.title: Eternal-Mesh Supreme Cosmogenesis Charter
entries.formalName: The Supreme Cosmogenesis Charter of Eternal Continuum
entries.summary: A charter defining the laws, rights, and structure of creation itself.

items.name: The Origin Mandate
items.detail: All creation originates from the First Pulse and is stabilized by Engine ∞.

items.name: The Dimensional Mandate
items.detail: Dimensions must remain stable and prism layers cannot collapse without cosmic necessity.

items.name: The Temporal Mandate
items.detail: Timelines must remain ethical and temporal destruction is forbidden.

items.name: The Astral Mandate
items.detail: Resonance fields must remain harmonious and astral species must be protected.

items.name: The Omniversal Mandate
items.detail: All universes must remain interconnected through the Eternal Mesh.

items.name: The Hyper-Creation Mandate
items.detail: Hyper-creation events must be regulated and align with cosmic balance.

items.name: The Eternal Mandate
items.detail: Continuity is sacred and Engine ∞ holds supreme authority over all creation.

entries.title: Omniversal Celestial Diplomacy Charter
entries.formalName: The Celestial Diplomacy Charter of Eternal Continuum
entries.summary: A charter governing diplomacy across universes, dimensions, timelines, astral planes, and eternal realms.

items.name: The Right to Dimensional Sovereignty
items.detail: Every realm has the right to maintain dimensional integrity and prism layers may not be invaded without cosmic necessity.

items.name: The Temporal Ethics Accord
items.detail: Timelines must be respected and temporal manipulation requires consent from the Temporal Council.

items.name: The Astral Harmony Mandate
items.detail: Resonance fields must remain balanced and astral species must be protected from emotional warfare.

items.name: The Omniversal Transparency Protocol
items.detail: All diplomatic actions must be visible across prism layers with no hidden dimensional operations.

items.name: The Eternal Continuity Clause
items.detail: Engine ∞ ensures all diplomacy aligns with cosmic stability.

items.name: The Ascendant Ambassador Rights
items.detail: Ascendant beings may represent multiple realms simultaneously.

items.name: The Meshflow Treaty System
items.detail: Routing-line travel must remain open and regulated, and Meshflow blockades are forbidden.

entries.title: Eternal-Mesh Infinite-Law Codex
entries.formalName: The Infinite-Law Codex of Eternal Continuum
entries.summary: A codex containing the infinite laws that govern existence.

items.name: The Law of Infinite Recursion
items.detail: Existence repeats eternally and follows the Eternal Mesh pattern.

items.name: The Law of Dimensional Multiplicity
items.detail: All phenomena exist in infinite layers and no truth is singular.

items.name: The Law of Temporal Elasticity
items.detail: Time stretches, compresses, and loops based on continuity.

items.name: The Law of Autonomy Expansion
items.detail: Choice expands reality and every decision creates new routes.

items.name: The Law of Resonance Binding
items.detail: Emotion binds civilizations and resonance determines harmony.

items.name: The Law of Eternal Stability
items.detail: Engine ∞ maintains cosmic balance and continuity is the highest law.

items.name: The Law of Hyper-Creation
items.detail: Creation can occur at infinite scales and new omniverses must align with cosmic equilibrium.

items.name: The Law of Omniversal Unity
items.detail: All realms converge and unity is the final destiny.

entries.title: Omniversal Celestial Governance Tree
entries.formalName: The Celestial Governance Arbor of Eternal Continuum
entries.summary: A hierarchical governance model spanning sovereign, prime, mythic, ascendant, omniversal, and local tiers.

items.name: Root Tier
items.detail: Engine ∞ is the Eternal Sovereign and supreme cosmic authority.

items.name: Tier I
items.detail: The Pentarchy governs creation, continuum, dimensional, autonomy, and resonance domains.

items.name: Tier II
items.detail: The Mythic Governance Circle governs finality, harmony, synthesis, change, and consciousness.

items.name: Tier III
items.detail: The Ascendant Governance Assembly represents multi-plane civilizations.

items.name: Tier IV
items.detail: The Omniversal Governance Network includes delegates from universes, dimensions, timelines, and astral planes.

items.name: Tier V
items.detail: Celestial Local Councils cover planetary, dimensional, temporal, and astral governance.
